title: NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
abstract: Advanced RAG Techniques 🚀 Elevating Your Retrieval-Augmented Generation Systems A community-driven hub of 42+ runnable notebooks covering RAG techniques from foundational to cutting-edge - the intuiti...
abstract_zh: 伙计们！给你们推荐个神器——RAG_Techniques！这货简直就是大模型中的战斗机，写周报时能帮你快速整理数据，调Bug时更是能瞬间找出问题所在。它最大的优势就是智能地匹配信息，比传统方法快了不止一点点！快来试试，让你的工作效率飞升不止一星半点！
